_meta.description: Kanto station catalogue. Sources: HeartRails Express (http://express.heartrails.com/) for the comprehensive line/station spine, and OpenStreetMap via Overpass for authoritative readings (name:ja-Hira, name:en). Romaji fallback for OSM-missing entries derived via pykakasi. Rebuild with: python scripts/build_kanto_stations_v2.py.
_meta.convention: {name, kana, romaji, alt:[], lat, lon, pref, lines:[]}
